summary: Verified reaper animation fixes: lantern glow position, robe skew animation, load-in opacity, and spin regression. All primary checks pass.

verification_results.lantern_position: PASS - lanPctX=48.99% (target 50%±8%), lanPctY=19.70% (target 20%±8%), top<35% confirmed. Glow correctly overlays skeleton's lantern in upper-right area of image box.
verification_results.robe_skew_animation: PASS - computed transform is matrix(1,0,<skewY>,1,0,0) with non-zero horizontal skew that changes over time. Samples ~500ms apart: 0.0147, -0.00517, -0.0597. Confirms skewX animation running (not rotation).
verification_results.load_in_opacity: PASS - reaper-bg computed opacity = 0.38 exactly, image visible, no console/page errors.
verification_results.lantern_flicker: PASS - opacity samples varied: [0.874, 0.555, 0.573, 0.417, 0.344, 0.643]. Warm flicker keyframes animating.
verification_results.spin_regression: PASS - clicked spin-roulette-button (ZIP 10001), spin-result-card appeared with restaurant details. shuffle-popup was likely too transient to catch in single query but spin flow completes successfully.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Reaper visual animation fully verified. Lantern at ~49%X/20%Y of image box (correctly on skeleton's lantern in upper-right). SkewX animation confirmed via changing computed transform matrix. Opacity 0.38. No regressions in spin flow.
